title: Smoked Paprika Roasted Potatoes
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make side dish that's perfect for any meal. The smoked paprika adds a deep, smoky flavor to the roasted potatoes.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into 1-inch (2.5 cm) wedges.
Place the potatoes in a bowl and drizzle with olive oil. Toss to coat.
Sprinkle the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper over the potatoes and toss to combine.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
